fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the posted assembly item.

fields.name: Search Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the search description of the posted assembly item. The value is copied from the Search Description field on the assembly order header during posting.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies the second description of the posted assembly item. The description is copied from the Description 2 field on the assembly order header during posting.

fields.name: Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the assembly order that the posted assembly order line originates from.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the posted assembly item.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Inventory Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the inventory account in the general ledger to which transactions from this posted assembly order are posted. The value is copied from the Inventory Posting Group field on the assembly order header during posting.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general product account in the general ledger to which transactions from this posted assembly order were posted. It is copied from the Gen. Prod. Posting Group field on the assembly order header during posting.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the General Business Posting Group that applies to the entry.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies if a comment exists for the posted assembly order.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies to which location the assembly item was output from this posted assembly order header.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shortcut dimension 1 value that is related to the assembly item on the posted assembly order. The value is copied from the Shortcut Dimension 1 Code field on the assembly order header during posting.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shortcut dimension 2 value that is related to the assembly item on the posted assembly order. The value is copied from the Shortcut Dimension 2 Code field on the assembly order header during posting.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the assembly order was posted.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the assembled item is due to be available for use.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the posted assembly order started.

fields.name: Ending Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the posted assembly order finished, which means the date on which all assembly items were output.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies to which bin the assembly item was posted as output on the posted assembly order header.

fields.name: Item Rcpt. Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item ledger entry that is associated with the reversal of the assembly order line during an undo assembly process.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the assembly item were posted with this posted assembly order.

fields.name: Quantity (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many assembly items, which are stated in the base unit of measure, were posted with this posted assembly order. The value is copied from the Assembled Quantity (Base) field on the assembly order header during posting.

fields.name: Assemble to Order
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the posted assembly order was linked to a sales order, which indicates that the item was assembled to order.

fields.name: Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: Cost Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total unit cost of the posted assembly order.

fields.name: Indirect Cost %
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the percentage of the posted assembly items direct unit cost that makes up indirect costs, such as freight and warehouse handling that are associated with the assembly of the item.
The value is copied from the Indirect Cost % field on the assembly order.

fields.name: Overhead Rate
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the indirect cost or overhead of the assembly item as an absolute amount on this posted assembly order. It is copied from the Overhead Rate field on the assembly order header during posting.
The amount is added to the items unit cost to reflect indirect costs, such as freight and warehouse handling that are associated with the assembly of the item.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity per unit of measure of the assembly item on the posted assembly order. The value is copied from the Qty. per Unit of Measure field on the assembly order header during posting.

fields.name: Reversed
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the posted assembly order has been undone.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the number series that is used to assign numbers in the No. field on the posted assembly order header.

fields.name: Posting No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number series for posted assembly orders.
The number series is also used for records that reflect reversed assembly order postings. For more information, see How to: Undo Assembly Posting.

fields.name: Order No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code of the number series that is used to assign a number to the assembly order when it is posted.
The number is copied from the Posted Assembly Order Nos. field in the Assembly Setup window.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code that is used to link entries to the posted assembly order.
The source code is copied from either the Sales field or the Deleted Document field in the Source Code Setup table.
